_doc: Ratchet baseline for scripts/check-convention-guard.cjs. rule3_pending may only SHRINK: fix a route (add auditServerEvent) -> remove its key; confirmed false positive -> move to rule3_exempt with a reason. A NEW mutating route absent from both buckets FAILS the gate.

_handlerLevel_rule3_guardInvisible.restrictedZones: /define mutates without audit (file DOES audit /entry-event) — file-level guard cannot see it
_handlerLevel_rule3_guardInvisible.billing: /verify (transactions.add + subscription grant) + /checkout (invoices.set) lack audit (file audits webhooks)
_handlerLevel_rule3_guardInvisible.loneWorker: check-in/end-session are state changes but persist nothing — add audit; guard keys on Firestore writes so it is invisible

rule3_exempt.cphsMinute: read-only aggregation; produces an in-memory draft, never persisted (guard matched an adapter ctor)
rule3_exempt.dataQuality: pure read; scanAll() is deterministic over already-fetched data, no Firestore writes
rule3_exempt.equipment: single GET; EquipmentAdapter.listByStatus is read-only (guard matched `new EquipmentAdapter`)
rule3_exempt.inbox: pure read aggregation over listByStatus/listPendingExecutiveReview, no writes
rule3_exempt.incidentTrends: read-only GET; computes a leading-indicator snapshot from incidents, no writes
rule3_exempt.loto: single read-only GET; adapter.list* only, no writes (guard matched adapter ctor)
rule3_exempt.openapi: GET-only public static OpenAPI spec + Swagger UI; res.set() headers matched, no Firestore writes
rule3_exempt.preShiftRisk: read-only GET; aggregates collections + pure composeShiftRiskPanel, no writes
rule3_exempt.riskRadar: read-only GET; in-memory buildRepeatingRiskRadar over incidents, no writes
rule3_exempt.softBlocking: pure compute, zero Firestore writes; client persists the override-audit struct downstream
rule3_exempt.systemEvents: internal event-bus relay (infra enqueue to system_events, idempotency-deduped), not a business record
rule3_exempt.vulnerability: read-only GET; adapter.getLatest snapshot, no writes
rule3_exempt.waste: read-only GET; adapter.list* only, no writes
rule3_exempt.workerReadiness: read-only GET; joins collections + pure computeReadiness(), no writes

rule3_pending.apprenticeship: [#3+#19] authorize lacks audit; /expose get->set race — verify
rule3_pending.compliance: [triage] coarse file-level match — confirm it must audit OR move to rule3_exempt (snapshot/cache/derived/idempotency)
